center.name: 馬德雷德迪奧斯河
center.summary: 馬德雷德迪奧斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Long-crested pygmy tyrant、White-throated antbird、Rufous-fronted antthrush等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the upper Purus River basin of far western Brazil, the Ucayali and Madre de Dios river basins in southeastern Peru, and Pando Department in far northern Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to riverine areas of the Amazon River, and is also found in northern Bolivia (confluent of Mamoré and Madre de Dios River)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the drainages of the Madre de Dios, Jurua, and Urubamba rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (It is known in French Guiana from a single specimen.) The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society calls the species hypothetical in Colombia. Major rivers in addition to the upper Amazon itself are the Napo, Pastaza, Ucayali, Madre de Díos, Jurua, and Tocantins. The white-bellied spinetail inhabits early successional growth on river islands, where it favors grassy areas with scattered bushes and small trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in eastern Peru east of the Rio Ucayali between the Amazon in the north and the Rio Madre de Dios in the south, in southwestern Brazil east to the Rio Madeira and south to Acre state, and in northwestern and central Bolivia to Cochabamba Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The purplish jay is found in southeastern Peru's Amazonas Department in the basin of the Madre de Dios River.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S
